gtx-1060-headless-ai-server.summary: Repurposing an MSI GS63VR (Pascal GTX 1060 6GB mobile, i7-7700HQ, 16GB RAM) as a headless Ubuntu 22.04 LTS server for local audio transcription (faster-whisper/WhisperX + pyannote.audio) and farm vision tasks (herd counting).

mining-scale-test-sim.summary: Scale-testing Stratum V2 / mining-pool stacks via simulation. Connection-count vs hashrate scaling (vardiff smooths share-validation rate, so connection layer saturates first). Primary reference: gimballock (Eric Price)'s marafoundation/stratum :: vardiff/simulation-framework branch (in-process deterministic vardiff characterizer; 4-axis Estimator/Statistic/Boundary/UpdateRule decomposition; Composed adapter; 1000-trial Poisson share-arrival harness). Adjacent: connection-scaling bottlenecks for TCP/QUIC pool servers, synthetic-miner methodology (fixture nonces, Poisson share arrival, regtest), share-validation cost model, binary-protocol load harnesses.

rust-multi-platform.summary: Survey of Rust's multi-platform surfaces: mobile FFI (UniFFI/swift-bridge/jni-rs), desktop cross-compilation (cross/zigbuild/cargo-dist), cross-platform UI frameworks (Tauri/Dioxus/Slint/egui/Iced), WASM (browser + WASI server-side).

sv2-p2pool-integration.summary: How to integrate p2poolv2 (decentralized share-chain pool) with sv2-apps (Stratum V2 reference implementation). Architecture surface, share-accounting, JDS job-validation, and operational paths.

iroh-transport-stratum-v2.summary: Iroh (n0-computer QUIC + raw-public-key TLS + relay-fallback) as an alternative SV2 transport alongside Noise-over-TCP. Motivation (DNS-free pool addressing, Erosion mitigation), Fedimint reference implementation, full integration playbook, risks (UDP throttling, QUIC perf ceiling), implementation plan executed in this repo's feat/iroh-transport branch.

bitcoin-mining-payout-schemas.summary: Bitcoin mining pool payout & accounting schemas — PPLNS, FPPS, PPS+, SOLO, PPLNS-JD (Stratum V2 Job Declaration variant), hashpool.dev (Cashu ecash mints redenominating shares as bearer tokens), btc++ payout/accounting tracks, p2pool / p2poolv2 share-chain accounting. Risk-shifting, variance, custody and SV2-JDS interactions.

pf2e-worldbuilding-tool.summary: Worldbuilding tool for the Pathfinder 2e (PF2e) tabletop RPG, shipped as a desktop app and an LLM-integrated app. Covers PF2e SRD/ORC licensing and data sources, worldbuilding-tool landscape (Kanka, World Anvil, Foundry, etc.), desktop app stacks (Tauri/Electron/Wails), LLM integration patterns (local Ollama, RAG over campaign notes, structured statblock generation), and world data modeling (graph vs document vs markdown-canonical).

pf2e-biblical-reskin.summary: Re-skinning Pathfinder 2e Remaster lore to fit a Christian Biblical worldview as a campaign setting / content pack. Covers prior Christian TTRPG history (DragonRaid, Testament d20, etc.), how the Remaster's alignment-removal + sanctification framework + typed energy damage make a monotheistic reskin mechanically natural, theological cosmology mapping (angelology, demonology, planes), the magic-vs-miracle problem for Bible-condemned sorcery, and class/ancestry reskin patterns.

frederick-county-va-crime-stats.summary: Neutral compilation of crime statistics for Frederick County, Virginia (Winchester area) and adjacent jurisdictions. Sources: FBI UCR/NIBRS, Virginia State Police annual reports, Frederick County Sheriff's Office, Winchester PD, U.S. Census. Trends, categories, jurisdictional breakdown (FCSO vs Winchester PD vs VSP), clearance rates.

ldk-server.summary: LDK Server — a ready-to-use Lightning Network node binary built on top of LDK Node, exposing a gRPC (Protocol Buffers) API. Architecture, deployment, gRPC surface, comparison vs LND/CLN/Eclair, integration patterns, and operational notes.

home-garden-pruning.summary: Pruning playbooks for the user's home garden: Kristin and BlackGold sweet cherries, thornless blackberries, Knock Out shrub roses, raspberries, blueberries. Timing, technique, training systems, sanitation, and renewal strategy per plant.

open-source-logos-suite.summary: Engineering an open-source alternative to Logos Bible Software (logos.com). Feature surface, existing OSS landscape (SWORD, STEP Bible, Open Scriptures), open biblical data, client architecture, and decentralized infrastructure (IPFS, libp2p, Iroh, ATProto, Nostr, Hypercore) for text distribution and user-data sync.

cdk-ldk-lnurl.summary: Deploying LNURL endpoints (LNURL-pay, LNURL-withdraw, Lightning Address) using Cashu Dev Kit (cashubtc/cdk) with the bundled LDK Node lightning backend. CDK lightning-backend feature flags, cdk-mintd binary topology, LDK Node embedding, persistence/channel management, and the LNURL surface needed in front of (or alongside) the mint.

fedimint.summary: Federated Chaumian e-cash protocol for Bitcoin custody. Architecture (consensus, mint, wallet, lightning, custom modules), federation guardians, threshold custody, Lightning gateways, and ongoing research on multi-currency / multi-denomination support. Comparison with Cashu re: unit handling.

sv2-coinbase-identity.summary: Thesis: can the Stratum V2 user_identity field on OpenMiningChannel be used by the Pool to embed a per-miner unique tag/marker into the coinbase transaction the Pool constructs, without invoking Job Declaration Protocol? Investigates SV2 spec, sv2-apps Pool implementation, JD-vs-Pool coinbase ownership, per-channel coinbase variation surfaces (extranonce_prefix, NewMiningJob), and miner-tagging patterns.

stratum-sri.summary: Stratum Reference Implementation (SRI) — the upstream stratum-mining/stratum repo of low-level SV2 crates: binary-sv2, buffer-sv2, codec-sv2, framing-sv2, noise-sv2, channels-sv2, handlers-sv2, parsers-sv2, extensions-sv2, subprotocols, plus the stratum-core workspace umbrella and stratum-translation (SV1↔SV2). Workspace layout, MSRV, release flow, contributing/security policy, and PR/commit history observed from main.

sv1-upstream-reverse-translator.summary: Reverse-direction Stratum translator: SV2 stack (miner / proxy / pool-front) talking to a Stratum V1 upstream pool. Inverse of the SRI translator-proxy (which is SV1-miner → SV2-pool). Covers SV2↔SV1 primitive mapping, what SV2 capabilities are lost when upstream is SV1, prior art (Braiins farm-proxy, P2Pool SV1 frontend), SRI architectural placement using channels-sv2 / roles_logic_sv2, and use cases (pool inertia, gradual migration, hashrate brokers, multi-pool failover).

datum.summary: OCEAN's DATUM (Decentralized Alternative Templates for Universal Mining) — protocol primary documentation, gateway internals, and the engineering question of an SV2-downstream DATUM-capable proxy. Originally scoped to OCEAN-xyz/datum_gateway (Stratum v1 + GBT + DATUM Protocol upstream); 2026-06-01 broadened to include SV2-downstream architecture, prior art, and operator value/threat model for replacing the gateway's SV1-to-ASIC leg with SV2.

clink-protocol.summary: CLINK (Common Lightning Interface for Nostr Keys) — ShockNet-led Nostr-native standards for Lightning Network interactions. Three primitives (Offers, Debits, Manage), Nostr transport (NIP-05 identifiers, signed events, blinded paths, web-of-trust) replacing LNURL's HTTPS dependency. Comparisons to BOLT12, NWC (NIP-47), zaps (NIP-57), Lightning Address. Reference apps from ShockNet (Lightning.Pub, Shockwallet) and interoperating clients.

nixos-reproducible-builds-bitcoin.summary: Nix and NixOS for reproducible builds of Bitcoin projects. Covers Nix primitives (flakes, fixed-output / content-addressed derivations, store-hashing, IFD, bootstrap chain), Bitcoin Core's actual deterministic-build path (Gitian → Guix, with Nix as adjacent ecosystem), and the Nix-flake stacks shipped by Bitcoin downstreams (NixBitcoin, BTCPayServer Nix module, Fedimint, LDK, sv2-apps, Krux/ColdCard firmware). Reproducibility verification, supply-chain provenance (SLSA, in-toto), and tradeoffs vs Guix.

bevy-game-engine.summary: Bevy — refreshingly-simple data-driven Rust game engine and app framework (MIT/Apache-2.0). ECS architecture, wgpu-based renderer, scheduler / archetype storage / plugin system, ecosystem (bevy_rapier, avian, bevy_egui, lightyear, bevy_replicon), editor situation, production users, and comparisons vs Godot/Unity/Unreal/Fyrox/Macroquad. Covers the Bevy 0.x → 1.0 trajectory, criticisms/limitations, and Bevy as a non-game application framework.

nostr-ecash-gaming.summary: Game engines, protocols, and specs that combine Nostr (event transport, identity, NIPs) with Cashu/Fedimint ecash (bearer tokens, blinded notes, mints) for game state, in-game economy, and item ownership. Anchored on Ethan Tuttle's nutchain / kirk / manastr trio plus broader landscape (ZapArcade, AwakeMSE, Cashu game integrations, NIP-90 DVMs, NUT-11 P2PK).

open-source-civ-likes.summary: Open-source / free software games in the Civilization-like (4X, grand strategy, empire-building) genre. Long-running implementations (Freeciv, C-evo), modern revivals (Freeciv21, Unciv), genre-adjacent OSS 4X (0 A.D., Unknown Horizons, OpenAge, Freeland), engines (Godot, Bevy, Qt, libSDL, web stacks), modding ecosystems, AI implementations, multiplayer architecture (turn-sync, lockstep, web), and licensing/governance.

rust-bitcoin-twir.summary: Rust Bitcoin ecosystem (rust-bitcoin/BDK/LDK/Stratum SRI/Fedimint/Cashu/Nostr crates) framed around finding submission-worthy items for This Week in Rust. TWiR submission rules, project release/blog cadences, COTW candidates, CFP-Projects/Events, contribution workflow.

his-words-app.summary: "His Words" — a faith-based digital wellness app concept that *interrupts* social-media use every N minutes with a 60-second Scripture pause (vs. the verse-gate pattern of Psalmo / Amen / Holy Focus / BibleFocus / FaithLock / Sanctum). Topic covers competitive landscape, iOS Screen Time / Family Controls / DeviceActivity APIs, Android Accessibility / UsageStats APIs, behavioral psychology of interruption vs. blocking, Christian app market sizing and monetization (Hallow, YouVersion, Pray.com), family / accountability prior art (Covenant Eyes, Bark, Accountable2You), Bible content licensing (API.Bible, ESV, NET), and differentiation vs. traditional Bible apps.

llm-writing-indicators.summary: Indicators of LLM-generated prose for reviewers and editors. Lexical tells (overused words: delve, tapestry, testament, underscore, boasts, realm, leverage; "not only… but also"; "it's important to note"), structural/rhetorical tells (rule-of-three, formulaic intros/conclusions, "it's not X, it's Y" antithesis, over-signposting, false balance), punctuation/typography tells (em-dash overuse, curly quotes, title-case headings, emoji bullets, bold-key-term density), tone/register tells (relentless positivity, sycophancy, vagueness). Empirical corpus evidence (post-ChatGPT word-frequency shifts in scientific abstracts), detector tools and their limits (GPTZero, Turnitin, Pangram, Binoculars, DetectGPT), model/version drift, and false-positive risk for non-native English writers.

covenantless-ark.summary: Covenantless Ark (clArk) — the Ark Bitcoin L2 variant that runs on current Bitcoin (no OP_CTV covenant), substituting n-of-n multisig presigning for the covenant. Round transaction mechanics: the ASP round, n-of-n batch/pool output, presigned VTXO transaction tree, connector/forfeit transactions, VTXO lifecycle and expiry, dropout/offline dynamics during a round, and the timeout-driven unilateral exit/refund path. Implementations: Ark Labs (arkd/arkade), Second (bark/clArk Rust), ark-rs. Comparisons vs covenant-based Ark, Lightning, statechains, timeout-trees.

sighash-anyprevout-bip118.summary: BIP-118 SIGHASH_ANYPREVOUT (APO) and SIGHASH_ANYPREVOUTANYSCRIPT (APOAS) — proposed Taproot-script sighash flags that omit the previous output (prevout) from the signed message, enabling pre-signed transactions to be rebound to a different outpoint. Covers status (draft/unactivated, signet-only, soft-fork bundling debate), semantics vs BIP-341, the Eltoo / LN-Symmetry motivation, and the effect on presigning transactions that must commit to an as-yet-unmined coinbase outpoint (mining-payout / share-accounting relevance), including limits (coinbase maturity, APO-vs-APOAS) and alternatives (CTV/BIP-119, ANYONECANPAY, template-side workarounds).

musig2-signing-ceremonies.summary: MuSig2 (BIP-327 two-round Schnorr multi-signature) run as an interactive signing ceremony over a wire protocol. The two communication rounds (nonce exchange, partial-signature exchange), optional nonce commit/reveal pre-rounds and why canonical MuSig2 drops MuSig1's commitment round, session framing / state machines / coordinator vs peer topologies, and dropout/abort/failure handling (nonce-reuse catastrophe, identifiable aborts, restart semantics, DoS surfaces). Reference implementations (libsecp256k1-zkp, rust secp256k1 musig, LND) and contrast with FROST/ROAST.

ark-boarding-sv2-mining.summary: Thesis wiki: is an online-while-mining covenantless Ark boarding Stratum V2 extension (n-of-n batch output, cosigning ceremony triggered post-block-found) viable on Bitcoin today without CTV/CSFS? The pivotal move is deferring the n-of-n cosigning ceremony to AFTER a block is found, when the coinbase outpoint is known, routing around the unknown-txid presigning wall (sighash-anyprevout-bip118). Reuses clArk n-of-n presigning (covenantless-ark) and interactive MuSig2 ceremonies (musig2-signing-ceremonies); anchored to demand-open-source/demand-share-accounting-ext.

local_wikis.name: compost-marketplace
local_wikis.summary: Knowledge base for fGw — Powder Keg WV chapter Farming God's Way compost marketplace on Nostr. Captures FGW invariants, app architecture, all 35 SPECs, decision log, post-MVP follow-ups, and reference research (Pyramid relay, Blossom, NIPs).

local_wikis.name: pool-v4-infra
local_wikis.summary: Knowledge base for pool-v4-infra — MARA's Stratum V2 mining pool deployment infrastructure. K8s-vs-alternatives research arc (3 theses), pool-v4-infra repo assessments, primitive-usage catalog, M1 materialize plan, Stack A parallel playbook. Moved out of the public-shareable hub on 2026-05-22 because contents are MARA-specific.

local_wikis.name: garrys-mod
local_wikis.summary: Local wiki for average-gary/bitcoin-garrys-mod — Bitcoin Core fork stacking jamesob's CTV/CSFS branch + Sjors's SV2 Template Provider stack (sv2-tp-0.1.19), activated on testnet4. First plan: rebase onto bitcoin/bitcoin master (5486ef8cc2).

local_wikis.name: christ-is-lord
local_wikis.summary: Knowledge base for christ-is-lord — v1.0.0 OSS desktop+mobile alternative to Logos.com. Repo-local assessments grounded in hub topics open-source-logos-suite (engineering basis) and rust-multi-platform (mobile/desktop validation). MIT-licensed; public-oss sensitivity.

local_wikis.name: para
local_wikis.summary: Repo-local wiki for parasitepool/para — Rust crate co-vendored with a ckpool C fork. Repo-specific assessments and plans grounded in hub topics sv2-coinbase-identity, bitcoin-mining-payout-schemas, and datum.
